```prompt
---
agent: agent
description: "Implement database failover and high availability"
---
# Database High Availability
## Task
Configure database high availability with failover.
## Requirements
1. Set up synchronous replication for HA. 2. Configure automatic failover.
3. Test failover procedure. 4. Monitor replication health.
5. Set RTO/RPO targets.
## Constraints
- Failover < 30s. Zero data loss with sync replication. Test failover quarterly.
## Success Criteria
- Failover automatic and fast. No data loss. Tested regularly. Health monitored.
```
